title: Spreadsheet Basics
description: Data, information, spreadsheet structure, fields, records, and qualitative and quantitative data for BTEC DIT Component 2.

steps.title: Do Now Activity
steps.content:
Do Now Activity

Answer these starter questions from your previous knowledge. Use short answers.
steps.js:
(function(){var qs=[{q:'What is data?',a:['raw facts and figures','facts and figures','raw facts','facts']},{q:'How can we visually represent data in a table?',a:['chart','charts','graph','graphs','chart or graph','charts or graphs']},{q:'What is a spreadsheet?',a:['a document that displays data using rows and columns','document that displays data using rows and columns','rows and columns','a document that organises data into rows and columns']},{q:'Which Microsoft software can we use to manipulate spreadsheets?',a:['excel','microsoft excel']}];var c=document.getElementById('dit-dna');c.innerHTML=qs.map(function(x,i){return '';}).join('')+'
';document.getElementById('dit-dna-check').onclick=function(){var ok=0;qs.forEach(function(x,i){var el=document.getElementById('dit-dna-'+i);var v=el.value.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');var pass=x.a.some(function(a){return v===a||v.indexOf(a)!==-1;});el.classList.toggle('correct',pass);el.classList.toggle('wrong',!pass);if(pass)ok++;});var fb=document.getElementById('dit-dna-fb');if(ok===qs.length){fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Good start. You have remembered the key starter ideas.';__markStepComplete();}else{fb.className='ex-feedback hint';fb.textContent='You have '+ok+' / '+qs.length+'. Improve any red answers, then check again.';}};})();

steps.title: Spreadsheet Basics
steps.content:
What is a spreadsheet?

A spreadsheet is a document that organises data using rows and columns. It is useful because data can be stored, sorted, calculated and turned into charts.

TermMeaning
CellA single box in a spreadsheet
RowA horizontal line, labelled with numbers
ColumnA vertical line, labelled with letters
Cell referenceThe column letter followed by the row number, such as B4
WorkbookAll of the sheets in one spreadsheet file

In Microsoft Excel, the cell reference tells you exactly where a piece of data is stored.

steps.title: Spreadsheet Vocabulary
steps.content:
What is a spreadsheet? - Task

Use the word bank to complete each sentence.

Word bank

Numbers | Letters | Workbook | Cell | Range | Number | Letter
steps.js:
(function(){var qs=[{text:'A single box in a spreadsheet is known as a',ans:'Cell',opts:['Cell','Range','Workbook']},{text:'Rows are labelled with',ans:'Numbers',opts:['Numbers','Letters','Workbook']},{text:'Columns are labelled with',ans:'Letters',opts:['Letters','Numbers','Range']},{text:'A cell is referenced using the column',ans:'Letter',opts:['Letter','Number','Workbook']},{text:'followed by the row',ans:'Number',opts:['Number','Letter','Cell']},{text:'All of the sheets in a spreadsheet make up a',ans:'Workbook',opts:['Workbook','Range','Cell']}];var c=document.getElementById('dit-vocab-task');c.innerHTML=qs.map(function(q,i){return '';}).join('')+'
';document.getElementById('dit-vocab-check').onclick=function(){var ok=0;qs.forEach(function(q,i){var el=document.getElementById('dit-vocab-'+i);var pass=el.value===q.ans;el.classList.toggle('correct',pass);el.classList.toggle('wrong',!pass);if(pass)ok++;});var fb=document.getElementById('dit-vocab-fb');if(ok===qs.length){fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Correct. You can now identify the core parts of a spreadsheet.';__markStepComplete();}else{fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='You have '+ok+' / '+qs.length+'. Re-read the sentence and try again.';}};})();

steps.title: Data and Information
steps.content:
Data and information

Click through each stage. The important idea is that information is data with meaning.

(function(){var steps=[{t:'1. Raw data',h:'

5, Yes, 25%, Red, 12

',n:'These are facts and figures, but we do not know what they describe yet.'},{t:'2. Add field names',h:'
AgeMember?DiscountHouse colourPoints
5Yes25%Red12
',n:'The headers give the data context. Now it has meaning.'},{t:'3. Key fact',h:'

All information is data, but not all data is information.

steps.title: Fields and Records
steps.content:
Fields and records

Tables are made from fields and records. A field describes one column. A record is one full entry, usually one row.

NameAgeFavourite game
Amira14Minecraft
Ben15FC 26

In this table, how many records are there?
steps.js: createMCQ('dit-record-q',['2 records','3 records','6 records','1 record'],0,'Correct. There are two rows of entries, so there are two records.','Not quite. A record is one full entry, usually one row.');

steps.title: Definitions Task
steps.content:
Definitions - Task

Match each key term to the correct definition.
steps.js:
(function(){var defs=[['Spreadsheet','A document that organises data into rows and columns.'],['Table','A structure that organises data into rows and columns.'],['Field','Describes data in one column and groups data of the same type.'],['Record','A single entry in a table, usually a whole row.'],['Data','Raw facts and figures.'],['Information','Data with context or meaning.']];var options=defs.map(function(d){return d[1];}).sort(function(){return Math.random()-0.5;});var c=document.getElementById('dit-def-task');c.innerHTML=defs.map(function(d,i){return '';}).join('')+'
';document.getElementById('dit-def-check').onclick=function(){var ok=0;defs.forEach(function(d,i){var el=document.getElementById('dit-def-'+i);var pass=el.value===d[1];el.classList.toggle('correct',pass);el.classList.toggle('wrong',!pass);if(pass)ok++;});var fb=document.getElementById('dit-def-fb');if(ok===defs.length){fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Excellent. These definitions are secure.';__markStepComplete();}else{fb.className='ex-feedback hint';fb.textContent='You have '+ok+' / '+defs.length+'. Check the highlighted rows and try again.';}};})();

steps.title: Representing Information
steps.content:
Qualitative and quantitative data

Text is often used for qualitative data. Numbers are often used for quantitative data.

Qualitative: data that cannot be measured, such as a name, colour, opinion or review.

Quantitative: data that can be counted or measured, such as age, score, price or percentage.
steps.js:
(function(){var qs=[['Student name','Qualitative'],['Age','Quantitative'],['Favourite colour','Qualitative'],['Test score','Quantitative'],['Review comment','Qualitative'],['Attendance percentage','Quantitative']];var c=document.getElementById('dit-type-task');c.innerHTML=qs.map(function(q,i){return '';}).join('')+'
';document.getElementById('dit-type-check').onclick=function(){var ok=0;qs.forEach(function(q,i){var el=document.getElementById('dit-type-'+i);var pass=el.value===q[1];el.classList.toggle('correct',pass);el.classList.toggle('wrong',!pass);if(pass)ok++;});var fb=document.getElementById('dit-type-fb');if(ok===qs.length){fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Correct. You can now separate measured data from descriptive data.';__markStepComplete();}else{fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='You have '+ok+' / '+qs.length+'. Ask: can this be measured or counted?';}};})();

steps.title: Storing Data Task
steps.content:
Create your data tables

Build two tables using the spreadsheets below.

  • Table 1 — a topic with qualitative data (names, colours, opinions, reviews).
  • Table 2 — a topic with quantitative data (scores, prices, counts, percentages).

Put your field names in row 1. Add at least 3 records (data rows) in each table.

Table 1 — Qualitative data

Table 2 — Quantitative data

l=document.createElement('link');l.rel='stylesheet';l.href=u;document.head.appendChild(l);}}function ljs(u,cb){if(window.jspreadsheet){cb();return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=u;s.onload=cb;document.head.appendChild(s);}lcss(C+'jsuites@4/dist/jsuites.css');lcss(C+'jspreadsheet-ce@4/dist/jspreadsheet.css');function blank(){return Array.from({length:10},function(){return new Array(6).fill('');});}function mkSheet(id){return jspreadsheet(document.getElementById(id),{data:blank(),columns:[{width:120},{width:120},{width:120},{width:120},{width:120},{width:120}],minDimensions:[6,10],tableOverflow:true,tableWidth:'100%',toolbar:true,about:false});}ljs(C+'jsuites@4/dist/jsuites.js',function(){ljs(C+'jspreadsheet-ce@4/dist/jspreadsheet.js',function(){var s1=mkSheet('dit-qual-sheet');var s2=mkSheet('dit-quant-sheet');document.getElementById('dit-sheet-check').onclick=function(){var fb=document.getElementById('dit-sheet-fb');var d1=s1.getData(),d2=s2.getData();var h1=d1[0].filter(function(c){return String(c).trim()!=='';}).length;var r1=d1.slice(1).filter(function(r){return r.some(function(c){return String(c).trim()!=='';});}).length;var h2=d2[0].filter(function(c){return String(c).trim()!=='';}).length;var r2=d2.slice(1).filter(function(r){return r.some(function(c){return String(c).trim()!=='';});}).length;if(h1<3){fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Qualitative table: add at least 3 field names in row 1.';return;}if(r1<3){fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Qualitative table: add at least 3 data records below the header row.';return;}if(h2<3){fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Quantitative table: add at least 3 field names in row 1.';return;}if(r2<3){fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Quantitative table: add at least 3 data records below the header row.';return;}fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Both tables complete. Well done.';__markStepComplete();};});});})();

steps.title: Formatting Extension
steps.content:
Extension: formatting your spreadsheet

Use the toolbar above the spreadsheet to improve the sample data below. Make it readable and professional, then tick each box to confirm what you have done.

Formatting checklist
steps.js: (function(){var C='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/';function lcss(u){if(!document.querySelector('link[href="'+u+'"]')){var l=document.createElement('link');l.rel='stylesheet';l.href=u;document.head.appendChild(l);}}function ljs(u,cb){if(window.jspreadsheet){cb();return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=u;s.onload=cb;document.head.appendChild(s);}lcss(C+'jsuites@4/dist/jsuites.css');lcss(C+'jspreadsheet-ce@4/dist/jspreadsheet.css');var data=[['Student','Score','Grade','Attendance %'],['Amira','85','A','95'],['Ben','62','C','88'],['Charlie','74','B','91'],['Diana','91','A*','99'],['Ethan','55','D','76'],['Fatima','78','B','87'],['George','83','A','93']];ljs(C+'jsuites@4/dist/jsuites.js',function(){ljs(C+'jspreadsheet-ce@4/dist/jspreadsheet.js',function(){jspreadsheet(document.getElementById('dit-fmt-sheet'),{data:data,columns:[{type:'text',width:130,title:'Student'},{type:'numeric',width:80,title:'Score'},{type:'text',width:80,title:'Grade'},{type:'numeric',width:130,title:'Attendance %'}],tableOverflow:true,tableWidth:'460px',toolbar:true,about:false});document.getElementById('dit-fmt-check').onclick=function(){var fb=document.getElementById('dit-fmt-fb');var done=[].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.dit-fmt-chk')).filter(function(c){return c.checked;}).length;if(done<4){fb.className='ex-feedback hint';fb.textContent='Complete at least 4 formatting steps and tick each box before confirming.';return;}fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Good work. Your spreadsheet is now readable and professional.';__markStepComplete();};});});})();

steps.title: End of Lesson Exam
steps.content:
End of lesson exam

Answer every question. Feedback appears after each one.
steps.js: createMCQSet('dit-exam',[{q:'A single box in a spreadsheet is called a...',options:['Cell','Workbook','Field','Record'],answer:0,right:'Correct. A cell is one box.'},{q:'Rows in a spreadsheet are labelled with...',options:['Numbers','Letters','Colours','Formulas'],answer:0,right:'Correct. Rows use numbers.'},{q:'Columns in a spreadsheet are labelled with...',options:['Letters','Numbers','Records','Sheets'],answer:0,right:'Correct. Columns use letters.'},{q:'Which term means data with context or meaning?',options:['Information','Raw data','A range','A record'],answer:0,right:'Correct. Information has meaning.'},{q:'Which option is quantitative?',options:['Age','Favourite colour','Surname','Review comment'],answer:0,right:'Correct. Age can be measured.'},{q:'What is a field?',options:['A column heading that describes a type of data','A whole spreadsheet file','One row entry','A chart'],answer:0,right:'Correct. A field describes a column.'},{q:'What is a record?',options:['One full entry in a table','One column heading','A spreadsheet formula','A workbook'],answer:0,right:'Correct. A record is usually one row.'},{q:'All of the sheets in one spreadsheet file make up a...',options:['Workbook','Cell','Field','Record'],answer:0,right:'Correct. The whole file is a workbook.'}]);

steps.title: Endless Practice
steps.content:
Endless practice

Answer 5 generated questions correctly. The step marks complete automatically.
steps.js:
(function(){var bank=[{q:'A single box in a spreadsheet is called a...',o:['Cell','Workbook','Record','Table'],a:0},{q:'Data with context or meaning is...',o:['Information','Raw data','A field','A range'],a:0},{q:'A whole row entry in a table is a...',o:['Record','Field','Workbook','Column'],a:0},{q:'A column heading that describes data is a...',o:['Field','Record','Cell','Sheet'],a:0},{q:'Favourite colour is...',o:['Qualitative','Quantitative','A workbook','A formula'],a:0},{q:'Test score is...',o:['Quantitative','Qualitative','A record','A field'],a:0},{q:'Rows are labelled using...',o:['Numbers','Letters','Cells','Workbooks'],a:0},{q:'Columns are labelled using...',o:['Letters','Numbers','Rows','Records'],a:0}];var solved=0,c=document.getElementById('dit-endless');function pick(){return bank[Math.floor(Math.random()*bank.length)];}function render(){var q=pick();var opts=q.o.map(function(x,i){return {x:x,i:i};}).sort(function(){return Math.random()-0.5;});c.innerHTML='

Correct answers: '+solved+' / 5

'+q.q+'

'+opts.map(function(o){return '';}).join('')+'
';c.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(function(btn){btn.onclick=function(){var fb=c.querySelector('.ex-feedback');if(parseInt(btn.dataset.i)===q.a){solved++;fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent=solved>=5?'Practice complete.':'Correct. Next question loading.';if(solved>=5)__markStepComplete();else setTimeout(render,800);}else{fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Not quite. Think about the exact definition, then try another.';setTimeout(render,1200);}};});}render();})();

quizQuestions.q: What is one single box in a spreadsheet called?
Rows and columns in a spreadsheet are used to...
What Microsoft software is commonly used to manipulate spreadsheets?
What is a field in a table?
options: A column heading that describes a type of data

quizQuestions.q: What is a record in a table?
options: One full entry, usually a row

quizQuestions.q: All of the sheets in one spreadsheet file make up a what?
Which cell reference is written correctly?
Why do field names make data more useful?
